# Release Notes

| Atribut | Keterangan |
| :--- | :--- |
| **Nama Proyek** | |
| **Kode Rilis** | v[MAJOR].[MINOR].[PATCH]-[TAG] |
| **Tanggal Rilis** | |
| **Release Manager** | |
| **PRD Reference** | PRD-[PROJECT]-v[VERSI] |

---

## Type Rilis

- [ ] **MVP** — Minimum Viable Product
- [ ] **R** — Regular Release
- [ ] **Hotfix** — Perbaikan darurat
- [ ] **LTS** — Long Term Support

---
